infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app uses the camera to scan documents and upload profile pictures.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app accesses your photo library to upload images.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: This app uses Face ID for secure authentication.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: This app uses Bluetooth to connect to your health wearable devices like Fitbit, Garmin, Apple Watch, Whoop, and Oura Ring to sync your health data.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: This app uses Bluetooth to connect to your health wearable devices to sync your health data.
infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: This app needs access to your health data to provide comprehensive health tracking and insights.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: This app needs to save health data to HealthKit to keep your health information synchronized.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: This app uses motion data to track your activity and workouts.
infoPlist.NSHealthClinicalHealthRecordsShareUsageD: This app needs access to your clinical health records to provide comprehensive health tracking.

plugins.bluetoothAlwaysPermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to connect to your health wearable devices
